mapper.select: select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid ) order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3

select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid} order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3
select a.db, a.owner, a.table_name from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where a.exetype = 'ARCHIVE' group by a.db, a.owner, a.table_name order by a.db, a.owner, a.table_name

select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where
order by jobid, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3
select distinct keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, pk_col from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where exetype='KEYMAP' and keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by key_cols
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piisteptable (jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wherestr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{sqlstr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piisteptable (jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wherestr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{sqlstr, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key_refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piisteptable select jobid, TO_NUMBER(version)+1, stepid, db, owner, table_name, pagitype, pagitypedetail, exetype, archiveflag, status, preceding, succedding, seq1, seq2, seq3, pipeline, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, wherestr, sqlstr, keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, key_refstr, sqltype, regdate, SYSDATE as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid}
delete from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piisteptable set db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, owner= #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_name= #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pagitype= #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pagitypedetail= #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exetype= #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, archiveflag= #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, preceding= #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, succedding= #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seq1= #{seq1}, seq2= #{seq2}, seq3= #{seq3}, pipeline= #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_col= #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_key_name= #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parallelcnt= #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, commitcnt= #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_col= #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wherestr= #{wherestr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sqlstr= #{sqlstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_name= #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_cols= #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_refstr= #{key_refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sqltype= #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regdate= to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), upddate= SYSDATE, reguserid= #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid} and seq1= #{seq1} and seq2= #{seq2} and seq3= #{seq3}
update cotdl.tbl_piisteptable set keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and EXETYPE= 'KEYMAP'

update cotdl.tbl_piisteptable set pagitype= #{pagitype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pagitypedetail= #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exetype= #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, archiveflag= #{archiveflag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, preceding= #{preceding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, succedding= #{succedding, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seq1= #{seq1}, seq2= #{seq2}, seq3= #{seq3}, pipeline= #{pipeline, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_col= #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_col= #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_key_name= #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wherestr= #{wherestr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sqlstr= #{sqlstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_name= #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_cols= #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, key_refstr= #{key_refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sqltype= #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regdate= to_date(#{regdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy/mm/dd'), upddate= SYSDATE, reguserid= #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid} and seq1= #{seq1} and seq2= #{seq2} and seq3= #{seq3}
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid )

select count(1) from ( select db, owner, table_name from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid ) and exetype in ('DELETE', 'UPDATE') group by db, owner, table_name ) f

select jobid, version, stepid ,max(seq1) as seq1, max(seq2) as seq2, max(seq3) as seq3 from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid} group by jobid, version, stepid
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid}

select a.jobid, a.version, a.stepid, a.exetype,count(1) as tablecnt from cotdl.tbl_piisteptable a, cotdl.tbl_piijob b where 1=1 and a.jobid = b.jobid and a.version = b.version and b.phase= 'CHECKIN' and b.status= 'ACTIVE' and b.version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid and phase= 'CHECKIN' and status= 'ACTIVE') group by a.jobid, a.version, a.stepid, a.exetype

select a.policy_id, a.jobid, b.exetype, count(b.table_name) as tablecnt from cotdl.tbl_piijob a, cotdl.tbl_piisteptable b where a.jobid = b.jobid and a.version = b.version and a.version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piijob where jobid = a.jobid and status = 'ACTIVE' ) and b.exetype in ('DELETE', 'UPDATE') group by a.policy_id, a.jobid, b.exetype order by a.policy_id, a.jobid, b.exetype
